title: Thiollierea fritillarioides
taxonomy: Thiollierea fritillarioides is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This classification places Thiollierea fritillarioides alongside other related species, such as Streptocarpus and Chirita. Gesneriaceae is a diverse family with approximately 1,500 to 2,000 species worldwide. These plants are primarily found in tropical regions of Africa, Asia, and the Americas. Thiollierea fritillarioides is native to New Guinea, where it grows in shaded, humid environments.
